mapper.sql: id, conversation_type, conversation_key, conversation_name, conversation_avatar, last_message_id, last_message_time, last_message_content, last_message_sender, last_message_seq, version, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE im_conversation SET last_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, last_message_content = #{lastMessageContent}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime}, last_message_sender = #{lastMessageSender}, last_message_seq = #{lastMessageSeq}, update_time = #{lastMessageTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM im_conversation WHERE conversation_key = #{conversationKey} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM im_conversation WHERE conversation_type = #{conversationType} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_conversation ( id, conversation_type, conversation_key, conversation_name, conversation_avatar, last_message_id, last_message_time, last_message_content, last_message_sender, last_message_seq, status, version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{conversationType}, #{conversationKey}, #{conversationName}, #{conversationAvatar}, #{lastMessageId}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{lastMessageContent}, #{lastMessageSender}, #{lastMessageSeq}, #{status}, #{version}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM im_conversation WHERE conversation_key = #{conversationKey} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM im_conversation WHERE id = #{conversationId} AND status = 1
